headline: Western Digital: Riding The AI Wave, Not Chasing It
summary: Western Digital has surged over 200% since December, dramatically outperforming the benchmark. Read why I maintain a Buy rating on WDC stock.

headline: Axon and Rocket Lab rallied while chip stocks sank
summary: SanDisk Corp. (SNDK) closed out the holiday-shortened week as the Nasdaq’s biggest loser, ending Thursday at $1,745 a share, down 26% for the week, according to Seeking Alpha. Micron (MU), Western Digital (WDC), Seagate (STX) and Teradyne (TER) fell alongside it, each posting double-digit weekly ...
